heading: Marine Corps officers: limitation on power to command
label: 8164 Marine Corps officers: limitation on power to command
text: Officers of the Marine Corps may not command vessels or naval shipyards.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)5944.34 U.S.C. 713R.S. 1617.The words “of the United States” are omitted as surplusage. The word “command” is substituted for the words “exercise command over any”.
Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–232section 5944 of this title
